title: heliotropium convolvulaceum var. californicum
intro: Heliotropium convolvulaceum var. californicum, also known as California heliotrope or California turnip, is a variety of the Heliotropium convolvulaceum plant, which is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's leaves and roots are used for their health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off bacterial and fungal infections, and acting as a natural laxative. Heliotropium convolvulaceum var. californicum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
